# Normalize function
import re, unicodedata
def normalize_ar(s):
    s = ''.join(ch for ch in s if ch not in ['\u0640'])  # remove tatweel
    # remove harakat
    harakat = ''.join(chr(c) for c in range(0x064B, 0x065F+1)) + '\u0670' + '\u0653' + '\u0654' + '\u0655'
    s = re.sub('['+re.escape(harakat)+']','',s)
    # unify hamza forms
    s = s.replace('أ','ا').replace('إ','ا').replace('آ','ا').replace('ؤ','و').replace('ئ','ي').replace('ة','ه')
    # remove punctuation
    s = re.sub(r'[^\w\s]', ' ', s, flags=re.UNICODE)
    s = re.sub(r'\s+',' ',s).strip()
    return s

target_full="لا تَزَوَّجَنَّ شُرَّعَتكَ"
target_snip="لا تَزَوَّ...شُرَّعَتكَ"
norm=normalize_ar(target_full)
norm

# Search hadith texts for substring match normalized

# Try search tokens
tokens=set(norm.split())
cands=[]
for rec in h:
    txt = rec.get('hadithTxt') or rec.get('Matn') or ''
    n=normalize_ar(txt)
    overlap = tokens.intersection(set(n.split()))
    if 'تزوجن' in n or 'تزوج' in n or 'انكح' in n or 'تنكح' in n:
        cands.append((len(overlap), rec, n))
len(cands)

# Find those with high overlap tokens
cands_sorted=sorted(cands, key=lambda x: (-x[0], len(x[2])))
cands_sorted[:5][0][2][:300]

len(res)
